layoutRegions.name: locker-summary
layoutRegions.purpose: At-a-glance counts for sealed bundles, pending attestations, rationale gaps, and retention windows.

layoutRegions.name: evidence-bundles
layoutRegions.purpose: Keyboard-focusable rows for review evidence bundles and their campaign ownership state.

layoutRegions.name: custody-and-retention
layoutRegions.purpose: Panels for reviewer signatures, exported access snapshots, custody notes, and safe sealing guardrails.

components.name: BundleRow
components.purpose: Focusable evidence bundle row with campaign, owner, status, and included artifact context.
interactions: hover and focus-visible states expose row selection
bundle state is shown with semantic info, warning, danger, or success

components.name: AttestationCard
components.purpose: Reviewer decision card that keeps signature state and exception rationale visible.
interactions: tone label stays visible without overlapping text
card sizing remains stable across responsive breakpoints

components.name: SealList
components.purpose: Ordered evidence sealing checklist for retention-safe review bundles.
interactions: primary retention action has visible hover and focus-visible states
guardrail numbers are stable and token-colored

acceptanceChecks: Generated app imports src/omarchy-theme.css before app styles.
Every visible color comes from a --omarchy-* CSS variable or color-mix using one.
Every button, row, input, and command item has a visible :focus-visible state.
Layout remains stable at 320px, 768px, and 1280px viewport widths.
Primary content is usable on first load without a marketing interstitial.
A .desktop launcher can be generated with omarchy-native app desktop.
An opt-in theme sync hook can be generated with omarchy-native app hook.
